text:
SOURCE: CMS (HPMS files) 

VALUES: Five-digit alpha/numeric value 

COMMENT: You need to know both the contract number and plan benefit package identification number (variable 
called PLAN_ID) to identify the specific plan benefit package offered to beneficiaries. 

This variable corresponds with the CONTRACT_NAME variable, which is the contract name that 
corresponds with this number. 

The CCW constructs the plan characteristics file from information submitted by plan sponsors to 
CMS’s
